name: Kaseya VSA
description: Monitor Kaseya VSA managed agents and endpoint compliance for RMM

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to your Kaseya VSA instance
2. Go to Configuration > API Access > Third-Party Tokens
3. Click Create Token
4. Set appropriate permissions (read access to Assets and System)
5. Optionally whitelist CompAI's IP: 54.159.77.69
6. Copy the Token ID and Token Secret
7. Enter your VSA URL, Token ID, and Token Secret above

credentialFields.label: VSA Server URL
credentialFields.helpText: Your Kaseya VSA server URL (e.g., https://yourcompany.vsax.net)

credentialFields.label: API Token ID
credentialFields.helpText: The Token ID from VSA > Configuration > API Access > Third-Party Tokens

credentialFields.label: API Token Secret
credentialFields.helpText: The Token Secret generated when creating the third-party token

checks.name: Device List
checks.description: Lists all managed agents enrolled in Kaseya VSA

checks.name: Secure Devices
checks.description: Checks agent online status and patch compliance across managed devices

checks.name: Monitoring & Alerting
checks.description: Verifies monitoring policies and alert configurations in Kaseya VSA
